initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    s.seller_name,
    SUM(sa.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold,
    AVG(p.price) AS avg_item_price,
    AVG(r.rating) AS avg_review_score,
    AVG(sa.packing_time) AS avg_packing_time,
    (
        SELECT c.category_name
        FROM products p2
        JOIN sales sa2 ON p2.product_id = sa2.product_id
        JOIN categories c ON p2.category_id = c.category_id
        WHERE p2.seller_id = s.seller_id
        GROUP BY p2.category_id, c.category_name
        ORDER BY SUM(sa2.quantity) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS top_category_by_sales
FROM sellers s
JOIN products p ON s.seller_id = p.seller_id
JOIN sales sa ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id
GROUP BY s.seller_id, s.seller_name
HAVING SUM(sa.quantity) > 100;

SELECT 
    s.seller_name,
    SUM(sa.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold,
    AVG(p.price) AS average_item_price,
    AVG(r.rating) AS average_review_score,
    AVG(sa.packing_time) AS average_packing_time,
    (
        SELECT c2.category_name
        FROM products p2
        JOIN sales sa2 ON p2.product_id = sa2.product_id
        JOIN categories c2 ON p2.category_id = c2.category_id
        WHERE p2.seller_id = s.seller_id
        GROUP BY c2.category_name
        ORDER BY SUM(sa2.quantity) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS top_category_by_sales
FROM sellers s
JOIN products p ON s.seller_id = p.seller_id
JOIN sales sa ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id
GROUP BY s.seller_id, s.seller_name
HAVING SUM(sa.quantity) > 100;

SELECT 
    s.seller_id,
    s.seller_name,
    SUM(sa.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold,
    AVG(p.price) AS average_item_price,
    AVG(r.rating) AS average_review_score,
    AVG(sa.packing_time) AS average_packing_time,
    (
        SELECT c.category_name
        FROM products p2
        JOIN sales sa2 ON p2.product_id = sa2.product_id
        JOIN categories c ON p2.category_id = c.category_id
        WHERE p2.seller_id = s.seller_id
        GROUP BY c.category_name
        ORDER BY SUM(sa2.quantity) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) AS highest_sales_category
FROM sellers s
JOIN products p ON s.seller_id = p.seller_id
JOIN sales sa ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id
GROUP BY s.seller_id, s.seller_name
HAVING SUM(sa.quantity) > 100;
